   - [DATA] Gold/Silver Ratio at 68.3 vs historical ~65 implies relative silver undervalue

   - [DATA] Silver intraday bounce +2.48% despite flat yields indicates buying interest at support
   - [TECHNICAL] 30d drawdown at -23.3% represents capitulation-level move amenable to reversal
